title: Yellow Fold Delight
description: An earthy and fluffy Algerian dish featuring yellow split peas folded into a festive mixture for a low-sodium-friendly breakfast option.

ingredients.name: 4 cups yellow split peas
ingredients.notes: Soaked for at least 6 hours or overnight

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, cooking until translucent.
Stir in split peas, tomatoes, and coriander seeds. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer mixture for about 20 minutes or until the peas are soft and fully cooked.
Fold the cooked mixture gently into a bowl to achieve an earthy consistency.
